narrative: ED triage 2026-05-21 10:14, ESI 4 acuity assigned per algorithm v4. Decision A: patient is not dying, intubated, or unresponsive; awake and alert oriented x3. Decision B: no high-risk situation; not confused or lethargic; no severe pain or distress; pain rated 4/10 from earlier ankle sprain. Decision C: resources needed counted — one resource (single x-ray). Decision D: vital signs evaluated against age-based HR RR SpO2 ranges — HR 76, RR 16, SpO2 99% room air, BP 124/78, temp 36.8°C, none in danger zone. Five-step path: not many resources + stable vitals (ESI 3 path not selected); one resource path selected → ESI 4 assigned. No-resources criteria (ESI 5) not applicable. Reassess at acuity interval 60 minutes. Patient instructed to wait in fast-track area.
